title: Customizer Legacy! (DISCONTINUED)
description: Mod that allows you to put camouflages on your tools
body:
Camouflages mod adds a variety of camouflages to your game so you can have different types of weapons with the help of a mod.

 

this mod includes
- several camouflages
- each sword based on its camouflage

 

the mod affects the comfort of the game, like wanting to have different swords on one server  
or simply have them in your solitaire world to make a large collection of swords.
